summary: 4 new REST endpoints: GET /v1/livestreams, /v1/creators, /v1/creators/{id}/content, /v1/settlements. Migration 004 adds 7 columns. 5 new tests all passing. No critical findings.

interfaceChanges.description: GET /v1/livestreams — paginated livestream sessions with duration, viewers, peak concurrent, orders
GET /v1/creators — paginated creators with GMV attribution and commission efficiency
GET /v1/settlements — paginated settlements with net revenue after deductions

Migration 004: livestreams.peak_concurrent_viewers, livestreams.click_count, creators.total_gmv, creators.commission_rate, settlements.platform_commission, settlements.affiliate_commission, settlements.shipping_fee (all nullable or server_default=0)

mappings.criterion: AC2 — GET /v1/creators returns GMV attribution and commission efficiency
AC4 — GET /v1/settlements returns net revenue after deductions

recommendations.description: New endpoints lack structured error logging on unexpected DB exceptions. FastAPI will return 500 but no log record is emitted. Consider adding a global exception handler or logging in the repo layer.
Content funnel endpoint uses offset limit (not cursor-based) — acceptable for MVP since creator content volumes are small.
